content.p: The recreation and parks commission shall have the power and duty to:
Act in advisory capacity to the council in all matters pertaining to recreation and parks.

Consider provisions of the annual budget for recreation and park purposes during the process of the preparation of the budget and make recommendations with respect thereto to the city manager and the council.

Assist in the planning of a recreation program for the inhabitants of the city, promote and stimulate public interest therein, and to that end, solicit to the fullest extent possible the cooperation of school authorities and other public and private agencies interested therein.
Accept money, personal property or real estate donated to the city for recreational or park purposes, subject to the approval of the council.
